creator: sgk@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
USB2 has broken libgphoto2.

 cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I.. -I.. -DLOCALEDIR=\"/usr/local/share/locale\" -DIOLI
BS=\"/usr/local/lib/libgphoto2_port/0.8.0\" -I/usr/local/include -Wall -Wmissing
-declarations -Wmissing-prototypes -g -D_GPHOTO2_INTERNAL_CODE -I/usr/local/incl
ude -I/usr/include/dev/usb -I/usr/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -fno-st
rict-aliasing -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -MT usb_la-libusb.lo -MD -MP -MF .d
eps/usb_la-libusb.Tpo -c libusb.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/usb_la-libusb.o
